content: w3champions API: backend at website-backend.w3champions.com/api/. Open-source (GitHub: w3champions/website-backend) but no official public API docs or Swagger spec found. Event-driven MongoDB architecture — MatchFinishedEvent processed into readmodels. Identification service uses Blizzard OAuth + JWT tokens (RSA 4096-bit). Auth flow: user authenticates via Battle.net, w3champions identification-service issues its own JWT. Third-party apps must piggyback on this flow or directly call the public API endpoints (discoverable from frontend source code). API is effectively public (no key required on many endpoints) but undocumented. Rate limits: unknown — treat as fragile community API.
